description: Communication backbone for the Paper marketing platform. Routes all human communication — questions, approvals, dashboards, commands — through WhatsApp.
author: Paperclip

whatsappPhoneNumberId.title: WhatsApp Phone Number ID
whatsappPhoneNumberId.description: The Phone Number ID from the WhatsApp Business API dashboard

whatsappAccessTokenRef.title: WhatsApp Access Token (secret ref)
whatsappAccessTokenRef.description: Secret reference for the WhatsApp Cloud API permanent access token

whatsappVerifyToken.title: WhatsApp Webhook Verify Token
whatsappVerifyToken.description: Token used to verify the webhook subscription handshake

whatsappBusinessAccountId.title: WhatsApp Business Account ID
whatsappBusinessAccountId.description: The WABA ID from Meta Business Manager

chairmanPhoneNumber.title: Chairman Phone Number
chairmanPhoneNumber.description: The chairman's WhatsApp number in international format (e.g. 972501234567)

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Public URL where WhatsApp will send inbound message webhooks

webhooks.description: Handles WhatsApp Cloud API webhook verification (GET) and inbound message processing (POST)

tools.name: whatsapp_send_message
tools.description: Send a text or template message to the chairman via WhatsApp.

to.description: Recipient phone number. Defaults to chairman if omitted.

templateName.description: Optional WhatsApp template name to use instead of plain text

tools.name: whatsapp_ask_chairman
tools.description: Send a question to the chairman via WhatsApp and wait for their reply. The reply is routed back to the calling agent's task as a comment.

question.description: The question to ask the chairman

context.description: Additional context to include with the question

taskId.description: The task/issue ID to post the reply back to

agentId.description: The ID of the agent asking the question

timeoutMinutes.description: How long to wait for a reply before timing out

tools.name: whatsapp_request_approval
tools.description: Send an approval request to the chairman with interactive Approve/Reject/Question buttons.

title.description: Short title for the approval request

description.description: Detailed description of what is being approved

taskId.description: The task/issue ID this approval relates to

amount.description: Dollar amount if this is a spend approval

metadata.description: Additional metadata to store with the approval

tools.name: whatsapp_send_dashboard
tools.description: Send a formatted KPI dashboard summary to the chairman via WhatsApp.

summary.description: A brief text summary or analysis

tools.name: whatsapp_send_notification
tools.description: Send a typed notification/alert to the chairman via WhatsApp.

actionRequired.description: Whether the chairman needs to take action
